//: Classes (backgrounds). 'armor' is added to derived defense. 'abilities' reference abilities.json; 'startingItems' reference items.json.

classes.name: Warden
classes.desc: Road-warden of the silent miles: shield on the back, hammer on the hip. Wardens hold the line so quieter people can run.

classes.name: Windcaller
classes.desc: A scholar-conjurer who argues with the air until it does something. Where the Hush deadens, a Windcaller insists on weather.

classes.name: Chanter
classes.desc: Keeper of the resonant rites: tuning forks, struck bowls, held notes. Chanters are the only people the Hush seems to actively hate — which they take as encouragement.
